key_moments.description: Male subject is seen in handcuffs.
Officer finds suspected drugs in the vehicle.
Officer conducts a pat-down search of the male subject.
Officer reads Miranda rights to the male subject.
Male subject is placed in the patrol car.
Female subject is seen in handcuffs.
Officer begins searching the trunk of the vehicle.

summary: The video shows a traffic stop where multiple officers are present. A male subject is detained in handcuffs while officers search the vehicle, finding suspected narcotics in the center console. The male subject is searched, read his Miranda rights, and placed in a patrol car. A female subject is also detained in handcuffs, and officers proceed to search the trunk of the vehicle.
